texto: ...at least that would explain the weeping and moaning emanating from the woman’s bedroom at night. It woke her regularly and created an illusion which suggested disembodied spirits roamed the corridors. And if there was one thing Melba would not have it was disembodied spirits roaming the corridors...
explicacao: Citação de Brian Kavanagh sobre temas ligados a fe. “...at least that would explain the weeping and moaning emanating from the woman’s bedroom at nigh…” articula fe, ghosts, wwii em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
